summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 52 - Cross-Client Intelligence Engine, Client Portal, and Meeting Automation. All 27 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Intelligence Engine page loads with practice-wide analytics, Client Portal login flow works with demo credentials, and disclaimer modal now shows only once per session (fixed from previous iteration).
critical_code_review_comments: Cross-Client Intelligence Engine provides comprehensive practice-wide analytics: portfolio drift, tax opportunities, engagement analysis, fee optimization, goals tracking
Client Portal has separate JWT authentication for clients with proper token validation
Meeting Automation generates structured meeting notes with compliance logging and follow-up email generation
Disclaimer modal now correctly uses sessionStorage to show only once per session - FIXED from iteration 51
All new routers properly included in server.py with /api prefix
Client Portal UI has clean design with tabs for Overview, Portfolio, Goals, Documents, Contact Adviser

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Intelligence Engine, Client Portal login, Disclaimer modal all working)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing mock data in intelligence.py and client_portal.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new Cross-Client Intelligence, Client Portal, and Meeting Automation features working correctly. Key APIs tested: /api/intelligence/comprehensive-analysis, /api/intelligence/portfolio-drift, /api/intelligence/tax-opportunities, /api/intelligence/engagement, /api/intelligence/fee-optimization, /api/client-portal/auth/login, /api/client-portal/dashboard, /api/client-portal/portfolio, /api/client-portal/goals, /api/client-portal/net-worth, /api/meeting-automation/generate-notes, /api/meeting-automation/generate-follow-up-email. Existing Command Center, Holdings, and Wealth endpoints continue to work. Disclaimer modal now shows only once per session (uses sessionStorage).
